series_metadata.series_description: Documents on each fire reported from field units listing personnel on fires, hours worked, and statistical data as to causes of fires, location, cost, etc.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for 3 years after close of fiscal year in which fire occurred, then destroy. If scanned and saved in an electronic format, the paper copy may be destroyed at that time. ; Electronic: Retain for 3 years after close of fiscal year in which fire occurred, then destroy., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
